personalInfo.name: Abdellatif Bouzid
personalInfo.title: Software Engineer
personalInfo.tagline: Building efficient, scalable software with focus on systems programming and performance-critical applications
personalInfo.bio: Software engineer with a strong focus on systems programming and performance-critical applications. Skilled in C, C++, Python, and experienced with OS internals, concurrency, and memory management. I enjoy solving deep technical challenges and building efficient, scalable software.

elements.welcomeMessage: I'm a software engineer passionate about systems programming, performance optimization, and building scalable distributed systems.
highlights: Expert in C, C++, and Python
Specialized in OS internals, concurrency, and memory management
Experience with distributed systems and microservices
Strong background in database systems and vector search indices
Proficient in Docker, Azure, Elasticsearch, and cloud services

elements.title: QThread: Lightweight C++ Threadpool Library
elements.description: Developed QThread, a header-only C++17 thread pool library enabling efficient task scheduling and lightweight parallel execution. Designed a work queue for safe concurrent task management with minimal synchronization overhead. Optimized for low latency and scalability in CPU-bound workloads, with focus on clean API design and modern C++ practices, including RAII, smart pointers, and templates.

elements.title: WEBSERV - HTTP Server in C++
elements.description: Led the development of a robust HTTP server using C++, emphasizing maintainable design and efficient networking. Implemented Single Process Event-Driven (SPED) architecture and incorporated design patterns such as State, Factory, and Singleton. Enhanced modifiability and maintainability through Composite pattern.

elements.title: FT_TRANSCENDANCE - Multiplayer Online Game
elements.description: Collaborated on developing a multiplayer online game utilizing Node.js, focusing on single-page application dynamics, WebSockets, and PostgreSQL integration. Managed real-time interactions, game development, live chat, and efficient database management using Docker Compose for seamless deployment.

elements.title: Large Vector Search Index (C++)
elements.description: Implemented an in-memory based large vector search index in C++, optimizing retrieval and contributing to research publications. Unified multiple research vector indices input/output formats for consistent benchmarking and experimental evaluation.

elements.title: Educational DBMS System
elements.description: Designed and implemented an educational Database Management System and served as a Teaching Assistant for the Database Management course.

Developed data pipeline for extracting insights from private documents and websites using multiple machine learning models to create knowledge graphs for visualization. Implemented algorithms for graph and tree-based vector similarity indices with retrieval and analysis capabilities. Implemented large vector search index in C++, contributing to research publications.
highlights: Built data pipeline with ML models for knowledge graph creation
Implemented graph and tree-based vector similarity indices
Designed and unified vector indices formats for benchmarking
Served as Teaching Assistant for Database Management course

elements.description: Designed and implemented high-performance distributed web scraping system using Spark engine and QubesOS. Developed Search API microservice using FASTAPI framework interfacing with Elasticsearch. Created Python package for Large-Scale LLM Batch Inference and established framework for developing REST APIs with CI/CD pipelines.
highlights: Built distributed web scraping system with Spark and QubesOS
Developed Search API microservice with FASTAPI and Elasticsearch
Created LLM Batch Inference package addressing rate limit challenges
Designed and implemented scraper/crawler system V2 with task distribution
Established REST API development framework with CI/CD pipelines
Designed background job management microservice using RAG system
